message:
feat(learn): redesign Glossary page with glassmorphic UI

- Dramatic ambient background with animated floating orbs
- Premium glassmorphic search with focus glow effects
- Beautiful category filter chips with gradient states
- Stunning letter group headers with gradient text
- Glassmorphic term cards with category gradients on hover
- Interactive expand/collapse with smooth animations
- Premium empty state design
- Consistent with new design system
